en: Minus twenty-five bucks for that phone. How much meth did you sell?
Last time I checked, there were sixteen ounces to a pound.
What'd you do with the rest? Smoke it? Yo, I've been out there all night slinging crystal.
ko: 야, 난 밤새 크리스탈 팔고 있었어.

en: You think it's cake moving a pound of meth one-teenth at a time?
So why are you selling it in such small quantities?
ko: 그럼 왜 그렇게 작은 양으로 팔고 있어?

en: Why don't you just sell the whole pound at once?
To who? What, do I look like Scarface?
This is unacceptable. I am breaking the law here.
This return is too little for the risk.
ko: 이 수익은 위험에 비해 너무 적어.

en: I thought you'd be ready for another pound today.
You may know a lot about chemistry, man, but you don't know jack about slinging dope.
Ah. Well, I tell you, I know a lack of motivation when I see it.
ko: 아, 내가 말해줄게, 나는 동기 부족을 보면 알아.

en: Oh, my God. Come on. You've got to be more imaginative, you know?
ko: 제발, 좀 더 창의적이 되어야 해, 알겠지?

en: Just think outside the box here.
We have to move our product in bulk, wholesale.
ko: 우리는 제품을 대량 도매로 팔아야 해.

en: Now, how do we do that?
